incidents.justification: The chatbot confidently fabricated a non-existent discount policy, producing false information that users could not rely on.
The assistant collected and retained sensitive employee and client information without users' knowledge or consent, violating privacy expectations.
The AI-generated video falsely portrayed a real person without disclosure, misleading the public and influencing market behavior.
The system indirectly discriminated against applicants based on a proxy for gender, resulting in unfair hiring decisions.
The biased moderation pattern went unchecked for weeks because no human monitored or reviewed the system's decisions.
Scammers used AI-generated voice cloning to impersonate an executive and deceive an employee into authorizing a fraudulent financial transfer.

stretch_notes: Clearview AI scraped billions of facial images from social media and websites without users' consent to build a facial recognition database. Regulators in multiple countries found this violated privacy laws because personal biometric data was collected and used without permission.
